title: Tak Bazierre
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Tak}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Tak Bazierre |homeworld= |birth= |death=During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]{{StoryCite|story=Pax Empirica—The Wookiee Annihilation|book=Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide}} |species=[[Cloning/Legends|Clone]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You, Dower.''"
''"Sir?''"
''"Helmet on, trooper.''"
''"Sir.|Tak Bazierre and Wayson Dower, in an exchange Dower repeated with other clones of Bazierre's batch|}} '''Tak Bazierre''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] with the rank of [[First Sergeant/Legends|First Sergeant]]. Like other [[GeNode]] [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] of his batch, an early one that was eventually discontinued, he was a [[Gender/Legends|man]] with greasy [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and a face that [[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] [[Wayson Dower]] regarded as cruel. During the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (19 BBY)|Imperial occupation of Kashyyyk]], Bazierre was assigned to [[Janzor]]'s [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]]. While en route to their landing site, Bazierre saw that Dower had his [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]] off. He ordered the corporal to put it on and identify the alert status that he had just signaled, using the exact phrasings that Dower had just heard from First Sergeant [[Oswald Strepp]], another clone from his batch. When Bazierre walked away, Dower rhetorically asked his friend [[Milo Strander]] if the sergeants were half [[Droid/Legends|droid]]. As the [[Transport/Legends|transport]] approached its landing on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], it struck a thick [[Tree/Legends|tree]] branch that tipped the ship on its side. Bazierre was standing too close to the open door and his [[Glove/Legends|gloves]], designed for protection rather than grip, interfered with securing a handhold. When he fell from the transport, he landed on a branch that broke his [[Bone/Legends|spine]] and [[Death/Legends|killed]] him. Bazierre thus became the first Imperial casualty of the battle with the [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]], the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]]. ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=Pax Empirica—The Wookiee Annihilation|book=Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Bazierre, Tak}} [[Category:Enlisted stormtroopers of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Non–Jango Fett clone stormtroopers]]
